LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER CAN BE FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THIS LAW. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND THE CITY'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JULY 9, 2021. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR# 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Sep-03-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Richard Grotch, Esq. (415-961-1691; rgrotch@jetstreamlegal.com) of Jetstream Legal for Defendant, Alaska Air Group, Inc.
No other appearances.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALASKA AIR GROUP, INC.'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs The First Paper Of Complaint.

Defendant Alaska Air Group, Inc.'s demurrer to "the first paper of complaint" is again ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41. If plaintiff Ravi Vaidyanathan continues to thumb his nose at this law, a sanctions motion will be entertained. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately. Defendant's response to "the first paper of complaint" is now due by October 1, 2021.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Off Calendar Jun-23-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ALASKA AIR GROUP, INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Alaska Air Group, Inc.'s demurrer to the complaint is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP 430.41, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with the law.

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco's demurrer is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP 430.41, which requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer can be filed. Plaintiff is ordered to comply with this law. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and the City's response to the complaint is now due by July 9, 2021.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
